title: viola sylvestris subsp. insularis
intro: Viola sylvestris subsp. insularis, also known as the Island Violet or Insular Wood Violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Viola. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Viola sylvestris subsp. insularis include soothing digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
